---
title: "Data Wrangling with dplyr and tidyr"
keypoints:
- FIXME
objectives:
- FIXME

questions:
- FIXME
teaching: 20
exercises: 10
source: Rmd
---


```{r, include = FALSE}
source("../bin/chunk-options.R")
knitr_fig_path("03-")
source("../bin/download_data.R")
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
flightdata <- read_excel("../data/flightdata.xlsx", na = "NULL")
delays <- flightdata %>% 
  group_by(carrier) %>% 
  summarise(avg_dep_delay = mean(dep_delay, na.rm =T),
            avg_arr_delay = mean(arr_delay, na.rm=T))
  
```

## Can we plot the average delays?

Yes we can!

```{r}
delays %>%  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = avg_dep_delay, y = avg_arr_delay)) +
  geom_point()
  
```
Maybe it would be a good idea to color the points based on carrier. That is,
we would like to map the carrier to the color of the points:

```{r}
delays %>%  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = avg_dep_delay, y = avg_arr_delay, color = carrier)) +
  geom_point()
  
```

{% include links.md %}
